text: {"findings":[{"layer":"semantic","severity":"warning","claim":"Microsoft posted Q1 revenue of $70.1 billion [F2], missing consensus by $1.6 billion [C1].","evidence":"The comparisons block [C1] only identifies 'revenue' as a comparison item; it does not contain a consensus figure or establish that revenue missed consensus by $1.6 billion.","recommended_fix":"Remove the 'missing consensus by $1.6 billion' characterization unless a consensus figure is explicitly provided in the source, or restrict the statement to what the data supports."}]}
